violations.text: Granola bars packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Granola bars were removed from top of display case and placed behind the glass for employees to hand to customers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement storage area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
Some ceiling tiles in the kitchen are stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2026

Scoops in the kitchen are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
Observed unwrapped single service items (pastry boxes) stored in the basement storage area. Single service items must be protected from contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
